discussion_comments.comment_body:
Thanks for the review.                                                                             
                                                  
  1. Good catch on the WSL normalization order. The resolver currently normalizes paths before the DetectedRepositories cache lookup, which causes the cache miss you described. Fixing by restructuring so the lookup runs against the un-normalized path, and normalization only happens at the moment of constructing the ProjectGroupKey. Adding unit tests for the WSL/Windows-mixed case and the no-cache fallback.
  2. Recording the video on a Windows VM with WSL set up so I can demonstrate the path normalization
  end to end. Will attach to the PR description and mark ready-for-review once attached.

Fixed - the mouse-state map is now interior-mutable, so render lazily inserts a persistent handle for any missing pill on first use instead of synthesizing a transient default that gets re-created on the next frame.
Does it make sense to remove this? This means we wouldn't be able to fetch new pr info if a pr was created externally

Addressed in 6591094314: received-message rows now derive a per-message collapsible ID from each received message ID, and block state registration creates one collapsible state entry per received message row.
